arts.ttl: Liam Roberts: Millwall goalkeeper issues statement as FA increase ban for challenge on Crystal Palace's Jean-Philippe Mateta
arts.sum: Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts issues a statement after having his three-match ban for a dangerous challenge on Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta increased by the Football Association.

arts.ttl: Watford confirm Cleverley signed a three-year contract in April
arts.sum: Chairman Scott Duxbury has used his programme notes for tomorrow's game to confirm the length of the contract the head coach agreed in April.

arts.ttl: Liam Roberts handed six-game ban for Mateta horror challenge
arts.sum: Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts has had his three-match ban upgraded to six games following his reckless red card challenge on Crystal Palace forward Jean-Philippe Mateta. Roberts connected with Mateta’s face with a wild kick during Millwall’s 3-1 defeat to Crystal Palace in the FA Cup last weekend. The French forward was forced off and required […] The post Liam Roberts handed six-game ban for Mateta horror challenge first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Millwall goalkeeper breaks silence on ban and reveals private Jean-Philippe Mateta gesture
arts.sum: Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts has been handed an extended six game ban following the challenge which injured Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta last weekend

arts.ttl: Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts handed extended ban as FA statement released
arts.sum: Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts has been waiting to hear whether or not he will receive a longer ban for his challenge on Jean Philippe-Mateta following an FA challenge

arts.ttl: Liam Roberts: Millwall goalkeeper hit with six-match ban for Jean-Philippe Mateta challenge
arts.sum: An independent regulatory commission upheld the FA’s appeal to increase suspension from three matches

arts.ttl: ‘I am devastated at what happened’: Millwall keeper Liam Roberts issues statement over Palace red card as FA increase his ban
arts.sum: “Finally, I want to say a huge thank you to everybody connected to Millwall Football Club for their continued support. Liam Roberts has seen his ban for his red card in Millwall’s FA Cup tie against Crystal Palace doubled by the FA.

arts.ttl: Millwall defender Ryan Leonard on triggering contract extension
arts.sum: This year I got myself in the team and was just really enjoying playing and not worrying about how many games I’d played or how my body was feeling. “It was after 25 starts that I think I triggered it,” Leonard, right, told the South London Press .

arts.ttl: 'I could have said no, it was my decision' - Selvik on joining Watford
arts.sum: The Norwegian goalkeeper had only been at Udinese a few weeks before moving to Hertfordshire, and is currently on a run of three successive clean sheets.

arts.ttl: Preview: Watford vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Watford and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
